meta.prompt_summary: Optimized for frontend engineering roles centered on React, TypeScript, dashboards, and reusable UI systems.

headline: Frontend Engineer | React, TypeScript, Enterprise UI Systems
summary: Fullstack developer with a frontend engineering focus, shipping production React and TypeScript applications across IoT, education, hotel management, and ERP products.
Builds reusable component systems, multi-tenant dashboards, and type-safe integrations while contributing across backend contracts, testing, and deployment workflows.

bullets: Developed production-grade React and TypeScript interfaces plus reusable component libraries, establishing shared design patterns and type-safe contracts adopted across 8+ company-wide projects.

Integrated smart door locks, switch and outlet relays, and IoT gateways into a centralized React dashboard that supports real-time control and monitoring for 50+ connected endpoints with sub-500ms response latency.

Aligned frontend and backend contracts through MongoDB and Prisma data modeling, PR reviews, CI/CD workflows in GitHub Actions, Firebase deployment, and Jest-based testing that reduced post-release bug reports by about 25%.
Supported sprint delivery across 6+ concurrent platforms in an Agile environment, using AI-assisted prototyping to accelerate implementation while maintaining code ownership.
Designed and delivered 3 responsive client-facing landing pages including the company's main website using HTML, CSS, and Bootstrap, with all pages passing cross-browser QA on first review.
Collaborated with the development team under SDLC practices, building early experience in Git-based workflows and team delivery.

projects.name: ALMA (Alternative Learning Management App)
projects.subtitle: Multi-tenant LMS with dashboards, attendance, and gradebook workflows
bullets: Architected a multi-tenant LMS serving 3 organizational tenants with role-based access for admins, instructors, and 200+ student accounts.
Built analytics dashboards, assessment flows, automatic quiz scoring, and grade computation features that reduced manual grading for instructors.
Developed attendance tracking and gradebook modules used by 15+ instructors across 40+ classes for real-time class record management and automated academic reports.

projects.name: IoT Device Dashboard
projects.subtitle: Centralized React interface for smart-device control and monitoring
bullets: Integrated REST-connected smart door locks, relays, and IoT gateways into a centralized dashboard experience.
Delivered real-time device control and monitoring for 50+ endpoints with sub-500ms response latency.

projects.name: ERP Platform Suite (Uzaro Solutions)
projects.subtitle: Shared product surfaces across HRIS, inventory, and order management
bullets: Contributed reusable product UI and contract-aligned workflows across HRIS, inventory, order management, and related enterprise modules.
Worked inside a multi-tenant platform architecture while balancing product delivery across several concurrent systems.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
bullets: Algolympics Champion - 1st Place, campus-wide algorithm programming contest (2nd Year).
Relevant coursework: Data Structures & Algorithms, Database Systems, Software Engineering, Object-Oriented Programming.
